description: Phase 26 scan_emission_completeness: every emitter declared in tool/_n6_lib (via out="reports/n6_<name>.json" pattern) must have produced its output file after a continuous-scan run. Dual of P22 (orphan detection) — P22 catches reports without emitters, P26 catches emitters without reports. A missing file usually means the scan function silently died mid-run (common cause: set -e triggered on a bare `var=$(grep ... )` when grep exits 1 for zero matches) or that the dispatcher never called it. Real gate: missing_count must be 0.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_emission_completeness.json ] && jq -r "if .missing_count == 0 then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_emission_completeness.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
